item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 2min Some final (yeah right) thoughts on the 2026 Masters includes a fairly scathing review
item.description:
Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 2min Some final (yeah right) thoughts on the 2026 Masters includes a fairly scathing review of Jon Rahm's performance, a look at just how many majors six is and why I'm never picking Bryson or a rookie again.
Today's newsletter is presented by @cobragolf . De normalsport.com 4 1 mil

item.title: NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 2min This is why we can never leave this place 4 52 3 mil
item.description: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 2min This is why we can never leave this place 4 52 3 mil

item.title:
TronCarterNLU: Tron Carter @TronCarterNLU · 12min Grupo Salinas should buy LIV.
#SharedProsperity #InclusiveBusinessModel Cita Josh C
item.description:
Tron Carter @TronCarterNLU · 12min Grupo Salinas should buy LIV.
#SharedProsperity #InclusiveBusinessModel Cita Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 1h Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund today approved its strategy for 2026-30: "This strategy complements the Fund’s long-term direction, focusing on building highly competitive local economic ecosystems that support integration across sectors, maximize the value of strategic 3 102 12 mil

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 14min On this day in 1994…
An 18-year-old amateur named Eldrick “Tiger” Woods hit his fi
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 14min On this day in 1994…
An 18-year-old amateur named Eldrick “Tiger” Woods hit his first shot on the @DPWorldTour , in Thailand.
And finds the fairway! De DP World Tour 1 19 1 mil
